response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a skilled full-stack and systems engineer, but he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. His C++ exposure is minimal — roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor thesis project — far short of the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. He has no demonstrable fixed income, derivatives, investment banking, or capital markets domain knowledge; a brief stint at RIDE Capital (German tax-optimized investing) does not constitute capital markets experience. SQL is listed as a skill but SQL Server and Oracle are not evidenced anywhere in his history. His genuine strengths in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and CI/CD infrastructure are not relevant to this engagement.
strengths: Strong CI/CD and DevOps fundamentals (GitLab CI, Docker, Artifactory) indicate solid engineering discipline
Demonstrated ability to work across multiple languages and paradigms, showing adaptability
Public speaking, workshops, and open-source contributions suggest strong communication and knowledge-sharing skills
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months, 2014–2015) — nowhere near the mandatory 5–10 years on Windows
Zero fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain knowledge
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle usage; primary database experience is MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
